name: Gold Exchange US
description_short: Phoenix walk-in gold and jewelry buyer paying same-day cash for gold, silver, platinum, coins, and luxury watches. Free appraisals, no appointment needed.
description_long:
Gold Exchange US is a local precious metals and jewelry buying shop in Phoenix, Arizona, operating since 2008. Founded by Arsen Sadykov, the business operates out of a suite at 2303 N 44th St and serves the Phoenix metro area as a walk-in cash-for-gold destination. The company holds no CDFI, HUD, NFCC, or comparable industry certifications, and no BBB accreditation was confirmed in publicly available records. Their focus is narrow and local — they are not a lender, credit repair firm, or investment dealer.

Gold Exchange US purchases gold jewelry, gold coins, gold bullion, silver, platinum, and luxury watches including Rolex. Their process is straightforward: customers walk in with items, receive a free appraisal on the spot, and if they accept the offer, get paid in cash the same day. Pricing is based on current precious metals spot market rates. There are no subscription plans, service fees, or recurring costs. The company explicitly does not appear to sell metals to customers — their model is purely acquisitional. Hours are Monday through Friday 10am–6pm and Sunday 10am–4pm; they are closed Saturdays.

What distinguishes Gold Exchange US in a crowded Phoenix market is their consistent customer satisfaction record. Their Google Maps profile shows a 5.0 out of 5 star rating across 96 reviews as of early 2026 — a notably high volume of positive feedback for an operation of this size. They emphasize a no-pressure, no-appointment walk-in model with free evaluations, which appeals to customers who have never sold precious metals before and may be uncertain about the process. The owner's direct involvement in a small-suite operation likely contributes to consistent service quality.

Honestly assessed, Gold Exchange US is a solid local option for Phoenix residents who need to liquidate gold, silver, or watches for immediate cash. Their strengths are real: high review scores, long tenure, and a transparent no-fee structure. The limitations are equally real. They operate from a single location with no online presence for remote transactions, no mobile app, and no published pricing — customers must show up in person to get an offer. Saturday closures limit weekend accessibility. The operation's small scale means no second opinion, no competitive bidding process, and no recourse mechanism if a customer later disputes a valuation. BBB status is unverified, which is worth noting for consumers who weight accreditation heavily.
pros: 5.0/5 Google rating across 96 reviews — unusually high score for a local gold buyer
Serving Phoenix since 2008 with 17+ years of operation under same ownership
No appointment needed — true walk-in service with same-day cash payment
Free appraisals with no obligation to sell
Buys multiple categories: gold, silver, platinum, coins, bullion, and luxury watches including Rolex
No fees, no commissions — straightforward spot-market transaction
cons: Closed Saturdays — the most common day for errand-running, limiting weekend access
Single Phoenix location only — no remote, mail-in, or online selling option
No published pricing or rate sheets — customers must visit in person to learn offer amounts
BBB accreditation and rating unconfirmed in public records
Very small single-suite operation with no formal dispute or recourse process described
best_for: Phoenix-area residents looking to sell inherited gold jewelry or silverware for immediate cash
Owners of luxury or Rolex watches wanting a local in-person appraisal
First-time sellers of gold coins or bullion who want a no-pressure evaluation
Individuals needing same-day cash without a loan or credit application
diagnosis: Gold Exchange US is best suited for Phoenix locals who want to sell gold, silver, or luxury watches quickly and in person, with no fees and no pressure. Their 96-review 5.0 Google rating suggests consistent service, but buyers on the hunt for competitive offers should note there is no published pricing and no way to transact remotely — you must walk in to find out what your items are worth.
services: Walk-in service with no appointment required
